ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "q_standard" INTEGER /* Quantity of standard packages ordered */,
  "q_small" INTEGER /* Quantity of small items ordered */,
  "q_box" INTEGER /* Quantity of box items ordered */,
  "demand" REAL /* Demand level for the order */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the order was created */,
  "committed_completion_time" TEXT /* Time committed for order completion */,
  "load_time" INTEGER /* Load time for the order in minutes */,
  "unload_time" INTEGER /* Unload time for the order in minutes */,
  "pickup_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pickup location */,
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the delivery location */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time for the order */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the order */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_pickup_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_id") REFERENCES pickups ("pickup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickups" (
  "pickup_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pickup location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the pickup location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pickup location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the pickup location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the pickup location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the pickup location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the pickup location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the pickup location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the pickup location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pickup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the delivery location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the delivery location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the delivery location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the delivery location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the delivery location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the delivery location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the delivery location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the delivery location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the vehicle in load units */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the driver */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the driver */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the driver */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the driver */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order assigned */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the order */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver assigned to the order */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route assigned to the order */,
  "estimated_route_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for the route */,
  "actual_route_time" TEXT /* Actual time taken for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_assignments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "pickup_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated pickup location */,
  "q_standard" INTEGER /* Quantity of standard packages in inventory */,
  "q_small" INTEGER /* Quantity of small items in inventory */,
  "q_box" INTEGER /* Quantity of box items in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the inventory */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_pickup_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_id") REFERENCES pickups ("pickup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was updated */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the status update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the delivery log */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver who made the delivery */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time the delivery was completed */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Signature of the recipient */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_logs_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "delivery_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the delivery (e.g., on time, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, dispatcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work done */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at the time of maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at which the next maintenance is due */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* ID of the start location */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* ID of the end location */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in miles */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "real_time_traffic" TEXT /* Real-time traffic conditions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the warehouse */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the warehouse */,
  "total_capacity" REAL /* Total storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_capacity" REAL /* Current storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
